hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-tight
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-snug
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-500

navbar.style: Sticky at top, z-50, crystal glassmorphism. Left: Nyay Saar logo (Cabinet Grotesk text, bold). Right: Home, Dashboard links. Subtle hover states on links (text color darkens).

hero.style: Centered, high negative space. Background features two massive blurred circles (one blue-200, one purple-200) moving slowly via Framer Motion. H1 is crisp and massive. Contains an 'AI-Powered Legal Clarity' badge (pill-shaped, glass border).

problem_cards.style: 3-column grid. Clean white cards, 2xl border radius, 1px subtle border. Minimal icons on top left. Lots of internal padding (p-10).

solution_flow.style: Horizontal layout. 3 steps connected by a subtle dotted SVG line. Each step has a circular number indicator and concise text.

benefits.style: 2x2 Bento grid or standard 4-column if space permits. Asymmetric sizing for bento (e.g., one wide card, two square cards) to add tension. Background of cards uses very pale, almost imperceptible gradients.

interactive_ai_tool.style: The centerpiece. A massive centered glassmorphic panel. Inside: dashed border drop-zone. On 'upload' interaction, swap to a split view: left side is a skeleton of a legal doc, right side is the 'AI Summary' card popping in with a neon green/success 'Verdict' highlight box.

social_proof.style: 3-column grid of massive numbers (Metrics typography) with small uppercase labels underneath. No borders, just pure typography suspended in white space.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors shadow-lg shadow-black/10
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border border-zinc-200 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-50 transition-colors

motion_and_interactions.global: Smooth, native-feeling easing. No bouncy or jarring animations.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Fade up with slight Y-axis translation (e.g., y: 20, opacity: 0 -> 1) using Framer Motion 'whileInView'.
motion_and_interactions.hero_bg: Continuous, slow CSS keyframe or Framer Motion translation of the gradient orbs in the background to create an 'ambient breathing' effect.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (y: -4px) and increase shadow opacity. Buttons scale down marginally (scale: 0.98) on active press.

media_and_icons.icon_library: lucide-react (stroke-width: 1.5 for a premium, lightweight feel)

images.description: Abstract light blue and purple gradient to be used as heavily blurred background layers (e.g., opacity-30, blur-3xl) in the hero or interactive tool section.
Black and white historic courthouse, can be used inside a bento card or section background with heavy white overlay to imply legal context without cluttering.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Rely heavily on utility classes.
Install and use 'framer-motion' for all scroll and background animations.
Ensure the hero section background has absolute positioned elements with heavy blur (e.g., blur-[120px]) and pale blue/purple colors to create the 'Apple-level' ambient gradient.
The 'Interactive AI Tool' section must look like a real functional component. Use React state to simulate a drag-and-drop to loading to completed summary flow.
Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Size them consistently.
Apply `data-testid` attributes to all buttons, input areas, and key sections.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn cards for marketing sections if they restrict layout; use raw HTML/Tailwind to build the 2xl rounded, soft-shadow glass cards.
Ensure 'Cabinet Grotesk' (or similar premium geometric font) is imported from Google Fonts/Fontshare in the global CSS.
